key_metrics_output: occurrence of macroplastics and microplastics; sampling methods from various environmental matrices; sample preparation and analysis; chemical and physical testing methods for identification and quantification of plastics
abstract: This technical report summarizes current scientific literature on the occurrence of macroplastics and microplastics in the environment and biota. It provides an overview of testing methods including sampling from various environmental matrices, sample preparation, and analysis procedures. The document describes chemical and physical testing methods for identification and quantification of plastics and gives recommendations for standardization of sampling, sample preparation, and analysis procedures. Indoor and health-related aspects are excluded from scope.
